title: JermsyBoy's Vanilla Edits
body:
This is my texture pack I've been developing in my Youtube series for a couple years now, based on my original pack A Little Taste of Jerm, but made to match the new vanilla textures a little better.



Join my Discord to give suggestions!
https://discord.gg/Ku478Wt
 

No I will not be backporting the pack to 1.12.2 or any earlier versions.

You may not redistribute the textures/models from this pack without my permission.
